title: Create a Product Pitch
scenario: Develop a product pitch for a new eco-friendly cleaning product that highlights its benefits, features, and unique selling points. The pitch should be engaging, persuasive, and tailored to a specific audience.
constraints: Must highlight the product's benefits and features
Must be tailored to a specific audience

evaluationCriteria.description: Assess if the pitch is engaging and likely to capture the audience's attention.
Evaluate if the pitch effectively highlights the product's benefits and features.
Check if the pitch is tailored to the specific target audience.
